description_long: This is a vibrantly decorated ceramic cup with a rounded body and a single, sturdy handle. The exterior is painted in a bright sky blue and adorned with whimsical black swirls, green leaves, and large yellow and orange floral motifs, giving it a playful, artistic appearance. The handle is integrated smoothly into the body and is also decorated with the same swirling pattern. The rim is wide and the cup's interior appears to be a plain, light gray, suggesting a glazed ceramic finish. The base is slightly narrower than the rim, providing stability while maintaining a classic cup silhouette. The overall design is eye-catching and would stand out in any urban or domestic setting.
description: A colorful, floral-patterned ceramic cup with a blue background, black swirls, and a single handle. The cup features bold yellow and orange flowers and green leaves, creating a lively, artistic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and a prominent yellow-orange flower with green leaves and black swirls on a blue background.
description_view_1: Back-right view with the handle visible and a close-up of the swirling pattern and partial floral motif.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous swirl and leaf pattern, with the handle mostly hidden from sight.
description_view_3: Left view dominated by a large yellow-orange flower and green leaves, with the handle not visible.
